title: Title
doc_html:
SUBPART F-1.  LOUISIANA COASTAL PROTECTION AND

RESTORATION FINANCING CORPORATION

§99.26.  Title

This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Coastal Protection and Restoration Financing Corporation".

Acts 2007, No. 249, §1, eff. July 6, 2007.
